mapper.insert: insert into wf_task (id, instance_Id, task_Name, display_Name, task_Type, perform_Type, operator, create_Time, finish_Time, expire_Time, action_Url, parent_Task_Id, variable, version) values (#{id}, #{instanceId}, #{taskName}, #{displayName}, #{taskType}, #{performType}, #{operator}, #{createTime}, #{finishTime}, #{expireTime}, #{actionUrl}, #{parentTaskId}, #{variable}, #{version})
mapper.update: update wf_task set finish_Time= #{finishTime}, operator= #{operator}, variable= #{variable}, expire_Time= #{expireTime}, action_Url= #{actionUrl}, version = version + 1 where id = #{id} and version = #{version}
mapper.select: select id, instance_Id, task_Name, display_Name, task_Type, perform_Type, operator, create_Time, finish_Time, expire_Time, action_Url, parent_Task_Id, variable, version from wf_task where id = #{taskId}

select id, instance_Id, task_Name, display_Name, task_Type, perform_Type, operator, create_Time, finish_Time, expire_Time, action_Url, parent_Task_Id, variable, version from wf_task where parent_Task_Id = #{parentTaskId}

select id, instance_Id, task_Name, display_Name, task_Type, perform_Type, operator, create_Time, finish_Time, expire_Time, action_Url, parent_Task_Id, variable, version from wf_task where parent_task_id in ( select ht.id from wf_historic_task ht where ht.instance_Id = #{instanceId} and ht.task_name = #{taskName} and ht.parent_task_id = #{parentTaskId} )
